content.subtitle: Use
items: singular countable nouns (not specific): I need to get **a** new coat.

content.subtitle: Use
items: instead of a when the next word begins with a vowel sound: I don't have enough money for **an** expensive dress.

content.subtitle: Watch out!
notes: Whether we use a or an with a word depends on the sound, not the spelling.

content.subtitle: Use
items: singular countable nouns (specific): Let's go to **the** new shopping centre.
plural countable nouns (specific): Where are **the** books I ordered?
uncountable nouns (specific): I gave the shop assistant **the** money and then left.

content.subtitle: Use
items: plural countable nouns (general): Prices have gone up a lot recently.
uncountable nouns (general): Fresh fruit is really good for you.

content.subtitle: Places
items: the: seas (the Atlantic), rivers (the Amazon), areas (the Antarctic), some countries (the USA, the UK), public buildings (the theatre), the Earth, the world, the sky, the moon, the sun, the sea, the environment
no article: towns and cities (Moscow), most countries (France), continents (Europe), streets (Baker Street), planets (Mars)

content.subtitle: Activities
items: a/an: have a job, work as a ...
the: on the radio, the media, play the piano
no article: go to work, on TV, go shopping, play tennis, listen to music, go to school, be at school, be at university, school subjects (maths)

content.subtitle: Time
items: the: in the morning/afternoon/evening, on the 20th March, in the 1950s
no article: days (Thursday), months (May), years (2009), at night

content.subtitle: People
items: the: the King, the Prime Minister, the army, the navy, the police, the Germans, the English
no article: become king, he's English, speak English

sections.title: A: a, an or the
sections.instructions: Complete each sentence with a, an or the.

items.sentence: I saw ...... interesting documentary on TV last night.
Can you close ...... window, please?
My sister wants to be ...... engineer.
We need to buy ...... new table for the kitchen.
Where did you put ...... keys I gave you?
He waited for ...... hour before the bus arrived.
They live in ...... small village near the coast.
I think ...... film we watched was excellent.

sections.title: B: Article or no article
sections.instructions: Write a, an, the or - (no article).

items.sentence: ...... fruit is good for you.
Can I have ...... apple, please?
...... apples in that basket are from our garden.
My dad is ...... teacher.
I usually go to ...... school by bus.
We met at ...... school gates at eight.
She plays ...... guitar very well.
My brother loves ...... music.

sections.title: C: Circle the correct word
sections.instructions: Choose the correct option in each sentence.

items.sentence: He's **a / an** honest person.
They arrived after **a / an** hour.
I need **a / an** uniform for school.
She paid with **a / an** euro coin.
Let's go to **the / -** cinema this evening.
We watched the match on **the / -** TV.
My parents are at **the / -** work now.
The programme was on **the / -** radio.

sections.title: D: Special rules (places)
sections.instructions: Complete with the if necessary. If no article is needed, write -.

items.sentence: ...... Amazon is the largest river in the world.
I've always wanted to visit ...... Europe.
They are travelling around ...... UK this summer.
My cousin studies in ...... France.
...... Earth moves around the Sun.
We had dinner at ...... theatre restaurant.
My aunt lives in ...... Moscow.
Children learn about ...... moon at school.

sections.title: E: Special rules (activities and time)
sections.instructions: Write the missing article or - (no article).

items.sentence: I go to ...... work at 8 o'clock every day.
My mum heard the news on ...... radio.
We usually play ...... tennis on Saturdays.
He can play ...... piano very well.
They got married on ...... 20th March.
She was born in ...... 1950s.
I'll call you on ...... Thursday.
I never drink coffee at ...... night.

sections.title: F: Error correction
sections.instructions: Each sentence has one article mistake. Write the correct article form.

items.sentence: She is an university student.
I like the music, especially jazz.
We're going to the school now (students speaking).
He works as the waiter in a hotel.
The English is spoken in many countries.
They visited Louvre in Paris.
My father listens to radio every morning.
I saw a moon last night.
She wants to buy ...... new phone.
We had lunch at ...... school canteen.
My grandparents live in ...... Spain.
Can you play ...... guitar?
He waited for ...... hour and left.
...... books on that shelf belong to me.

sections.title: H: Key word transformation
sections.instructions: Complete the second sentence using the keyword given.

items.sentence:
I work as teacher in a primary school. **A**
I work as ...... in a primary school.

We listened to news on radio. **THE**
We listened to news on ...... .

Her brother is in hospital now. **THE**
Her brother is in ...... now.

I like fruit, especially bananas. **NO**
I like ......, especially bananas.

They are travelling around USA next month. **THE**
They are travelling around ...... next month.

She studies at university in London. **NO**
She studies at ...... in London.
